shared_components.name: criterion hero
shared_components.contract: Same structure, spacing, typography and responsive behaviour across Criteria 1–7.

shared_components.name: criterion action card
shared_components.contract: Refresh, exports, diagnostics and View tools share the Criterion 5 layout.

shared_components.name: View tools popover
shared_components.contract: Explicit JS-controlled popover; supports export current table, export exceptions and copy filtered link.

future_rule: New criteria must use the shared Criterion 5 framework instead of adding criterion-specific hero, action-card or toolbar CSS.
